title: RenewalCreateRequest
description: Validation rules for creating a renewal from an expiring policy (F0007-S0006). Only policyId is required — other fields are inherited from the policy or defaulted.

policyId.description: The expiring policy to create a renewal for. Must reference a valid, non-deleted policy with no active renewal.

assignedToUserId.description: Override default self-assignment. Only DistributionManager and Admin may assign to a different user.

lineOfBusiness.description: Override if policy LOB is null or needs correction.

lobAttributes.description: Dynamic renewal-stage attributes. If omitted, creation inherits or resolves the policy's active renewal-stage product bundle.
